Key_Responsibilities: 1. Client Relationship Management | Act as the primary point of contact for assigned clients. | Build, maintain, and strengthen long-term relationships at multiple levels (business, technology, procurement). | Conduct regular client review meetings. | Ensure high client satisfaction, proactively address concerns, and escalate internally where needed. | 2.
